Landing.tagline: Discover who you are. Then what you love. Then where to go.
Landing.phase0Desc: Colors, shapes and spaces — your instinctive reactions reveal what words hide
Landing.phase1Desc: 15 questions about your character, thinking and values
Landing.phase2Desc: 12 questions about your passions and your world
Landing.resultDesc: Concrete, specific routes tailored to you

Quiz.p0ColorsTitle: Pick the 3 colors that draw you in the most
Quiz.p0ColorsSub: Follow your instinct — don't overthink it. The order you pick them in matters.
Quiz.p0ColorsHint: Select 3 colors in your preferred order
Quiz.p0ShapesSub: Pick the main one — then add a second if you feel between two.
Quiz.p0SpacesTitle: Where would you want to spend your working days?
Quiz.p0SpacesSub: Where you feel most alive and productive — not where you think you should be.
Quiz.p0StimTitle: Which of these images grabs you most?
Quiz.p0StimSub: Answer in under 3 seconds — your first reaction is the true one.
Quiz.procSub: Every choice says something about you — even the one that seems irrational.
Quiz.multiHint: You can choose one or more answers
Quiz.p1ResultCtaTitle: Now let's find which world you're at home in
Quiz.p1ResultCtaBody: Phase 2 dives into your passions, hobbies and what you truly love — to find the specific field where your profile reaches its full potential.

Gate.teaser: You came out as {title}. Enter your email to unlock your full profile and your paths.
Gate.consent: I agree to receive my results by email and accept the privacy policy.
Gate.preview: Just show me a preview (don't save)
Gate.errorInvalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
Gate.errorConsent: Please accept the privacy policy to continue.
Gate.errorIncomplete: Some answers are missing. Please retake the quiz.
Gate.errorRateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait a little while and try again.
Gate.errorServer: Something went wrong saving your profile. Please try again.

Results.sub: These are the concrete, specific paths where your profile reaches its full potential. None is more or less valid — it all depends on how congruent it is with who you are.

align.both: Your visual choices align with your text profile on both dimensions — archetype and domain. This reinforces the overall reading.
align.arch: Your visual choices confirm your archetype. Your passion domain may still evolve — explore more worlds before deciding.
align.dom: Your visual choices confirm the domain. Your operating style may have further nuances beyond the text profile.
align.none: Your visual and text choices diverge slightly. This is normal for complex or transitioning profiles — there's no "correct" reading.

Results.philoTitle: Potential doesn't depend on the path
Results.philoBody: You won't find stars or ratings on these paths. The congruence percentage you see is the only metric that matters. A florist at 94% congruence builds an empire. A lawyer at 41% just survives. IKEA started by selling matches. The path doesn't decide the outcome — you do.
